scripts.build:yarn: corepack enable && corepack install && yarn set version stable
scripts.build:prebuild: yarn dlx npm-check-updates -u && yarn config set enableImmutableInstalls false && yarn install
scripts.build:directories: rm -rf publish && mkdir -p publish && mkdir -p publish/mynsweepr-angular && mkdir -p publish/mynsweepr-hooks && mkdir -p publish/mynsweepr-react && mkdir -p publish/mynsweepr-react19 && mkdir -p publish/mynsweepr-next
scripts.build:nobuild: yarn install && cp *.*js publish/ && cp *.html publish/ && cp *.css publish/ && cp -r hm-grid publish/hm-grid && cp -r design publish/design
scripts.build:workspaces: yarn workspaces focus --all && yarn workspaces foreach -v --all --exclude heretic-monkey.link run build
scripts.build: yarn run build:yarn && yarn run build:prebuild && yarn run build:directories && yarn run build:nobuild && yarn run build:workspaces && yarn run build:predeploy && yarn config set enableImmutableInstalls true
